gold brick, worth about $500,
has been turned out by the Wilcox
mines stamp mill.


Recent shipments from Santlon
were as follows: Stranger, 20 tons
Ruth, 20 tons; SLOGAN Star, 1875 tons.


According to ]. NJ. Harris, a car
load of SLOGAN ore was formerly
worth $4,000. Now it is worth only
$4,000.


1t was stated today by E. F. Tell
ing of Fort Steele that there is pend
ing a 100000 mining deal in the
gold quartz mining camp Of Wild
Horse Creek.


Reports from Fort Steele. B. c.,
say that there Is no doubt that the
st. Eugene mine will be in operation
by the first of May If the price of
lead goes little higher.


A trial shipment of about 20 tons
Of Ethel ore from the Lardeau was
recently made to the Trail and realiz-
ed Sis a ton for lead and silver The
ore averages about 400 ounces silver
and 81 in gold to the ton.
